feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to create custom catalogs and target mapping
entry.content:
Is there any detailed steps on how we can create a custom catalog and group as well as the target mapping?

addition to our query, may we know how to delete the published variant in UI?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Label in F4 is not getting displayed for the fiori local annotations
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a value help using local annotations for my custom fiori application. Below is the code 

            <Annotations Target="Odata.PO_Self_Service_HomePage/POStatus">
                <Annotation Term="Common.ValueList">
                    <Record Type="Common.ValueListType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Parameters">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterInOut">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="POStatus" />
                                    <PropertyValue Property="LocalDataProperty" PropertyPath="POStatus" />
                                </Record>
                                <Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterDisplayOnly">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="Description"/>
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="CollectionPath" String="ZPOStatusValueHelp" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="SearchSupported" Bool="true" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="valueHelp" />
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
 
Issue is i dont see the PO status label in the output but strangely i could see the description. 

But the same i could see in the top to search. what is that i am missing here ? 

KR,

Anji

entry.title: default characters are not appearing by default while creating DIR in fiori app from manage document
entry.content: default characters are not appearing by default while creating DIR in fiori app from manage document

entry.title: Issue with UploadSetwithTable - Unsupported Media Type (415) in RAP (S/4HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am working on a RAP-based application in S/4HANA Public Cloud where I need to attach multiple files and upload them using the UploadSetwithTable control.

However, I am encountering the following error during upload:

Error Response:

{
"message": "The server is refusing to process the request because the entity has an unsupported format"
}

HTTP Status: 415 (Unsupported Media Type)

Implementation Details:-

My Fragment code: 

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns:f="sap.f" xmlns:upload="sap.m.upload">
   
    <Dialog id="uploadDialog" title="Upload File" draggable="true" resizable="true" contentWidth="50%" contentHeight="50%">
        <content>
            <Table id="table-uploadSet"
                inset="true"
                autoPopinMode="true"
                hiddenInPopin="None"
                items="{path: 'attachmentModel>/Attachment', templateShareable: false}">
                <headerToolbar>
                    <OverflowToolbar>
                        <Title text="Documents" level="H2" />
                        <ToolbarSpacer />
                        <ToolbarSeparator />
                        <upload:ActionsPlaceholder id="uploadButton" placeholderFor="UploadButtonPlaceholder" />
                    </OverflowToolbar>
                </headerToolbar>

                <dependents>
                    <plugins.UploadSetwithTable
                        id="uploadSet"
                        uploadUrl="/path"
                        multiple="true"
                        beforeUploadStarts=".onBeforeUploadStarts"
                        uploadCompleted=".onUploadCompleted"
                        cloudFilePickerEnabled="true"
                        actions="uploadButton">
                        <rowConfiguration>
                            <upload.UploadItemConfiguration
                                fileNamePath="Filename"
                                mediaTypePath="Mimetype"
                                urlPath="url"
                                previewablePath="previewable"
                                fileSizePath="fileSize"
                                isTrustedSourcePath="trustedSource"/>
                        </rowConfiguration>
                    </plugins.UploadSetwithTable>
                </dependents>

                <columns>
                    <Column id="fileName" importance="High">
                        <header>
                            <Label text="File Name" />
                        </header>
                    </Column>
                    <Column id="actionButton" importance="High" />
                </columns>  

                <items>
                    <ColumnListItem>
                        <cells>
                            <Text text="{attachmentModel>Filename}" />
                            <Button type="Transparent" icon="sap-icon://decline" press="onRemoveHandler"/>
                        </cells>
                    </ColumnListItem>
                </items>
            </Table>
        </content>
        <endButton>
            <Button text="Close" type="Transparent" press="onCloseFileUploadDialog"/>
        </endButton>
    </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

Controller code: 

onBeforeUploadStarts: function (oEvent) {
            var oUploadSet = oEvent.getSource();           
            var oItem = oEvent.getParameter("item"); // Get the item inside mParameters

            var oModel = this.getView().getModel("zmm_sd_pr_atch");
            var csrfToken = oModel.getHttpHeaders()["X-CSRF-Token"];
 
            var sContentType = oItem.getMediaType() || "application/octet-stream";
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "x-csrf-token", text: csrfToken })
            );
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "slug", text: oItem.getFileName() })
            );
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "Content-Type", text: sContentType  })
            );
},
onUploadCompleted: function (oEvent) {
            var iResponseStatus = oEvent.getParameter("status");
       
            if (iResponseStatus === 201) {  // Check if upload is successful
                this.getView().getModel("zmm_sd_pr_atch").refresh(true);
                MessageToast.show("Document Added Successfully");
            } else {
                MessageToast.show("File upload failed.");
            }
        },
 

Any guidance on proper request formatting would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Error during request to remote service: ran into a timeout after 60000ms.
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

I have this error when I try to retrieve data from SAP Backend to SAP CAP.

Error during request to remote service: Request to URL: http://<host> ran into a timeout after 60000ms.

I use timeout and I increase this param to 300000, but the request is not take this value.

I apply the param requestTimeout, this is taked but I have a another error.

And the same time, I noticed the connection is closed before 5 min.

 

Best regard,

Angel Gutierrez

entry.title: SD: Material XXX does not exist in warehouse XXX Message No.: V1392
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I'm entering an order in TRX VA01, but when I place the material, it shows an error: Material XXX does not exist in warehouse P010. Message number: V1392. I'm seeing the error because I have the material stored in warehouse P011, and I need to send it to that warehouse.

Is there some extra configuration where it's taking warehouse P010 instead of P011?

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: Fiori-Style Analytics Dashboard: 'Invalid Username/Password' Error for Non-Manager Users
entry.content:
After logging into SAP Business One, our system automatically loads the Fiori-style Analytics dashboard (Pervasive Analytics). While the Manager user has no issues accessing the dashboard, other users consistently receive an "Invalid Username/Password" error when the dashboard loads.

Details:

  • SAP Business One Version: Sap Business One 10 FP 2502
  • Database: SAP HANA (SLD connection user is SYSTEM)  - version Hana 2.00.059
  • Issue: After successful login to SAP Business One, the Fiori-style dashboard attempts to load and fails for non-manager users with the error "Invalid Username/Password".
  • Manager User: Works perfectly without any errors.
  • Other Users: Despite having the required permissions for analytics, they are facing authentication issues only with the dashboard.

What I've Checked/Done:

  • User Permissions: Verified that all affected users have the necessary authorizations for Analytics and Pervasive Analytics.
  • SLD & Database Connection: Confirmed that the SLD database connection user is SYSTEM, which has all required privileges.

My Questions:

  1. What could cause the "Invalid Username/Password" error for non-manager users when accessing the Fiori-style dashboard, given that the Manager user works fine??
  2. Are there any known configuration settings or workarounds for ensuring that all users benefit from the SYSTEM user's privileges (like PAL_ROLE and AFL execution rights) when accessing Analytics?

entry.title: SAP Fiori tools extensions pack issue for migrating neo apps from web ide
entry.content:
Issue with all the apps both in BAS and VS tool for migrating the apps from the neo web ide.

Do any one have the solution how to resolve this.

entry.title: Record Warehouse defect serial managed material
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

As described on this SAP Help site to perform a posting in EWM with a quality notification it is required to create and link a warehouse defect in advance to provide to stock-specific information for the quality notification.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/2bc3ee8d1c83404e8cf62418640004f2/15a64024397f4e219c2c800576023304.html?locale=en-US

Unfortunately the standard fiori app doesn't support serialized products. Already discussed with a SAP product/topic expert:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/fiori-apps-quot-record-warehouse-defect-quot-does-not-support-product-with/qaq-p/12685370

This topic is also not mentioned in the SAP Roadmap.

Is there any way to return a serialized material in private cloud to a supplier with a quality notfication process?

Kind regards

Michael

entry.title: RFQ Output Status Stuck at 'To be Output' in Manage RFQ Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am reaching out for help regarding an issue I encountered in the Manage RFQ Fiori app while processing a Request for Quotation (RFQ). If anyone has faced a similar situation or has insights on how to resolve it, your input would be greatly appreciated.

Issue Description

After following the standard process to create and publish an RFQ, I noticed that the Output Details status is not updating as expected. Here are the steps I followed:

  1. Created an RFQ in the Manage RFQ app.

  2. Published the RFQ successfully.

  3. Observed the Output Details: Instead of showing "Completed," the status remains as "To be Output."

  4. Also its not triggering a mail in SOST.

Expected Behavior

Once the RFQ is published, the Output Details status should change to "Completed" if the process has executed successfully as well as its should trigger the mail in SOST.

Possible Causes (Assumptions)

I suspect that one of the following might be causing the issue:

  • Check OPD Transaction: Verify that all configurations in OPD (Output Parameter Determination) are correctly set up and assigned to the appropriate output types.

Request for Help

Has anyone encountered a similar issue in Manage RFQ? If so, what steps did you take to resolve it?

Any guidance or troubleshooting steps would be greatly appreciated! Looking forward to your expert insights.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Issue while getting login user data in SAP Build Workzone
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing issue while fetching the login user id details in SAP Workzone, i have tried 3 options but none of them are working, kindly help.

OPTION 1:

 <card:Card
                    id="myCard" manifest="url"
                    manifestUrl="../webapp/manifest.json"
                    width="100%"
                    height="400px" visible="true"/>
 
   var oCard = this.byId("myCard");
            // Safety check
            if (oCard && oCard.getHostInstance) {
                var oHost = oCard.getHostInstance();
                var currentUser = oHost.getContextValue("sap.workzone/currentUser");
                MessageBox.error("Current User Info:", currentUser);
            } else {
                MessageBox.error("Card or HostInstance not available yet.");
            }
Error at getHostInstance() as its null.
 
OPTION 2:
 this.getOwnerComponent().oComponentData._sapUiIntegration_card.getHostInstance().getContextValue("sap.workzone/currentUser/email").then(function (value) {
                MessageBox.success(value)
            })
Error : no data in oComponentData
 
OPTION 3:
 onInIt: function(){
   this._loadUserInfo();
         },

            _loadUserInfo: function () {
                const sUrl = "/user-api/currentUser";
                const oUserModel = new JSONModel();
   
                oUserModel.loadData(sUrl);
                oUserModel.dataLoaded()
                    .then(() => {
                        this.getView().setModel(oUserModel, "userInfo");
                    })
                    .catch((oError) => {
                        console.error("Failed to fetch user info", oError);
                        // Optional: show message or fallback UI if needed
                    });
            },
 
xs-app.json
   {
      "source": "^/user-api/currentUser$",
      "target": "/currentUser",
      "service": "sap-approuter-userapi",
      "authenticationType": "none"
    },

Error: No data

entry.title: Re: Annotations with Dynamic values to make CRUD operatio...
entry.content:
I found the following example by SAP beneficial: Developing an SAP Fiori Elements App Based on a CAP OData V4 Service: Applying Generic Actions Provided by SAP Fiori Elements

For "Capabilities.DeleteRestrictionsType.Deletable", you need to use a property with a boolean data type, but has an integer value (0 = false, 1 = true).

For "Capabilities.UpdateRestrictions.Updatable", you need to use a property with a boolean data type and has a boolean value.

entry.title: Graduate Student Programs for SAP Certification - Seeking Advice
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently pursuing my Master's in Information Systems and have about 5 years of experience as an ABAP Developer.

As I continue my academic journey, I'm looking to enhance my credentials with the SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud  and SAP Fiori Application Developer certification. I'm specifically interested in:

  • Are there any special programs or discounts available for graduate students pursuing SAP certifications
  • Does SAP offer any university alliance programs that provide certification opportunities?
  • Has anyone here completed this certification while being a student? If so, what was your experience like?
  • Any recommendations on the best preparation resources for this certification that are budget-friendly for students?
  • Are there any mentorship programs available for students aiming to specialize in SAP development?

Additionally, if there are any specific grants, scholarships, or corporate sponsorship programs that support SAP certification for graduate students, I'd appreciate that information as well.

I believe this certification would strengthen my professional credentials and prior industry experience, making me more competitive in the job market as I advance my career in SAP development.

Thank you in advance for your insights and advice!

Best regards,
Kavyasri

entry.title: Convert a Smart Table Column Data to clickable actions in Fiori Elements Custom Card
entry.content:
HI,

I have a custom card in SAP FIORI Overview page . 

Card has a smart table with columns rendered via CDS view where in one of the column i need to convert the text to clickable actions.

My data from CDS looks like "Google,SAP" or "SAP" .

How can i convert these data to clickable actions .

My table extension code looks like below 

  onInit:function{
oSmartTable = this.getView().byId('LineItemsSmartTable');
                    oSmartTable.attachBeforeRebindTable(this.extendColumn.bind(this));
}
extentColumn:function(){
const oMultiStatusColumn = aColumns.find((col) => col.getLabel().getText() === "MultiStatusColumn");
var oMultiStatusColumnTemplate = new sap.m.HBox({
                        items: {
                            path: "MultiStatusColumn",
                            formatter: this.formatLinks.bind(this)
                        }
                    });
                 oMultiStatusColumn.setTemplate(oMultiStatusColumnTemplate);
}
formatLinks: function (sValue) {
                    if (!sValue) return [];
                    var aValues = sValue.split(", "); 
                    return aValues.map(function (sText) {
                        return new sap.m.Link({
                            text: sText,
                            press: function () {
                                sap.m.URLHelper.redirect(sText, true); 
                            }
                        });
                    });
                }
}

 This code throws either a missing template error or a List Binding error .

Any Suggestions or workaround for this scenario @pmuessig @Edrilan_Berisha 

Thanks,

Abhi

entry.title: Penpot UI kit
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm UX designer working with SAP, and I'm currently transitioning to Penpot as my primary design tool. I've noticed that SAP provides the Fiori/S4HANA UI kits for Figma, but I couldn't find any official components library for Penpot. 

Are there any plans to make the UI kits available for Penpot? Or has anyone in the community successfully adapted the existing UI stencils for use in Penpot?

Looking forward to your insights!

entry.title: Configured Destination using CAP service and its not showing in BAS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Am creating my first Fiori app in BAS using CAPM service as backend. I have created a destination using CAPM service. First i have tried creating destination using https://XXX.hana.ondemand.com but got 404 error. Later https://XXX.hana.ondemand.com/odata/v4/XX tried using this url and connection response is 200.

But either of the ways am not able to see the destination while creating Fiori application. Could you please help me with this issue.

Regards, Sai Ram Dinesh Pallapotu

entry.title: CAP Fiori app giving 404 error in BTP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on Fiori app, am trying to create a Fiori app inside the CAP project and created successfully. In local it's working fine but after deploying whole mta file, app is visible in HTML5 application section but showing 404 error. After modifying somethings, Business Solution column of Fiori app changed to CAPM project name and it's working fine for the first time. Later Business Solution field data is changed to Fiori app name and stopped working. Not getting what's happening here.

Could you please me help with this.

Regards,

Sai Ram Dinesh

entry.title: Okta SSO Integration with Fiori
entry.content:
Anyone willing to share their config settings for Okta SSO and SAP?

I've tried following these guides:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/connect-okta-to-identity-authentication/ba-p/13468665

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-abap-saml2-sso-with-okta-idp-using-sap-web-dispatcher/ba-p/13572704

Okta is our IDP.  I've tried both using the default app and creating a custom app in okta to configure things.  IAS has Okta imported and set up.

Issues I'm running into:

When using the following values in okta (same index number), I get stuck at the splash page.  No sign in page for username and credentials.

Single Sign On URL: https://<the current ACS endpoint URL>?sp=<sp_name>&index=<index_number>

Recipient URL <Launchpad URL>

Destination URL: https://<the current ACS endpoint URL>?sp=<sp_name>&index=<index_number> Audience Restriction OKTA

If I use the following, I get the sign in page but username and password are blank:

Single Sign On URL <Launchpad URL>

Recipient URL: https://<the current ACS endpoint URL>?sp=<sp_name>&index=<index_number> Destination URL: https://<the current ACS endpoint URL>?sp=<sp_name>&index=<index_number> Audience Restriction OKTA

Am I missing something very simple?

entry.title: How to extend headers in fiori list object
entry.content: I am creating a CAP application with fiori UI using list object floorplan. I want to extend my header to add one more custom heading. is it possible ?

entry.title: Hide columns in Overall Release of Purchase Requisitions screen via My Inbox app
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I would like to seek for advice on how to hide a column in the Overall Release of Purchase Requisitions screen in My Inbox app. I am able to add 4 columns (Asset Number, Internal Number, GL Account and Cost Center) by using CDS View extension. After adding the columns, I was requested to hide one column (Connected Material) as the table now looks squished and that particular column is not in use. However, I am unable to use CDS Metadata extension because there is no annotation to allow metadata extension in the CDS C_PurRequisitionItemFs. Is there any way I could hide the column? Any advice would be appreciated. Thank you!
